common.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

auth.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please reconnect.
auth.no_characters: No characters found. Create a new one.

security.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please slow down.
security.ban_notice: You have been banned from this server.
security.kick_notice: You have been removed from the server.

admin.permission_denied: You do not have permission to perform this action.

errors.server_unreachable: Cannot reach the server. Please try again.
errors.not_found: The requested resource was not found.

character.not_owned: You do not own this character.
character.max_reached: You have reached the maximum number of characters.
character.slot_taken: That character slot is already in use.
character.selection_failed: Character selection failed. Please try again.

item.duplicate_id: An item with this ID already exists.
item.invalid_metadata_schema: The provided metadata schema is invalid.
item.cooldown_active: That item is on cooldown. Try again later.
item.no_quantity: You do not have enough of that item.
item.broken: That item is broken and cannot be used.

vitals.sync_failed: Failed to sync vitals after character select.
vitals.rate_limited: Too many vitals requests. Please wait before trying again.

inventory.insufficient_quantity: You don't have enough of that item.
inventory.slot_occupied: That inventory slot is already occupied.
inventory.stack_limit: That would exceed the item's stack limit.
inventory.overweight: Your inventory is over the weight limit.
inventory.capacity_full: Your inventory is at maximum capacity.
inventory.slot_out_of_range: That slot exceeds your inventory capacity.
inventory.weight_limit_exceeded: This item would exceed your weight limit.
inventory.capacity_conflict: Cannot reduce capacity: slots are already in use.
inventory.partial_move_failed: Cannot partially move items to an occupied slot with a different item.

plugin.permission_denied: Plugin does not have the required permission.
plugin.health_degraded: Plugin is degraded — repeated failures detected.
plugin.health_failed: Plugin has failed and been disabled.
plugin.api_call_denied: Plugin API call denied: required permission not held.

tasks.queue_overloaded: Task queue is overloaded. Try again later.

ops.degraded: System is degraded — some subsystems are impaired.
ops.failed: System has failed — critical subsystems are unavailable.
ops.requeue_failed: Task requeue failed — task not found in dead-letter queue.
ops.readiness_failed: Readiness check failed — one or more critical subsystems are unavailable.
